feedback.text: I'm writing this to show my support to the Digital Fairness Act, because i think the objectives are good for consumers of any kind of digital content. With this being said, i ask you to add something to stop videogame publishers from shutting down online games and taking them off of digital stores without giving them a way to be played offline or a full refund of the game and the additional content bought for it. I've had an experience regarding this problem when the servers for "Friday the 13th: The Game", published by Gun Media and developed by IllFonic, were shut down and the game was removed from the stores, leaving me and many other people with a game that didn't work, and worst of all without giving us a full refund, so they basically stole our money. I just hope that you can help us defeat the greed of these publishers, because this is starting to get absurd.
